failures.description: The agent omitted the required product_type: "Smartphone" argument from the ProductCatalogSearch call, causing the tool invocation to fail and preventing retrieval of the requested catalog evidence.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to search for available black Smartphones priced above 1143.42. The required product_type value, Smartphone, was available from the original task and from the Coordinator plan. At index 2, the Researcher prepared ProductCatalogSearch arguments without the required product_type field despite the tool schema explicitly requiring it. The following tool step produced a SchemaError confirming the invocation was malformed. This was not resolved later.
